name: Assassin’s Mark
effect: Mark a visible enemy within 6". While within 1" of a friendly with a Stealth token, that enemy has -1 Defence.

name: Fade into Shadows
effect: This fighter gains a Stealth token.

name: Leader
effect: Choose two friendly fighters within 6" of this model. Both fighters may immediately perform a free 3" move (this cannot be used to leave Melee Range).

name: Shadow Step
effect: Choose a point within 6” that is not visible to any enemy. Teleport this fighter to that point.

name: Silent Ambush
effect: This fighter makes a bonus Move if they have a Stealth token and are not visible.

name: Smoke Bomb
effect: Friendly fighters within 6" gain a Stealth token if they are not currently visible to enemy fighters.

name: Vanish
effect: Remove fighter from board, set up 6"+ from enemies. Gain Stealth token.
